debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
fc : ContDiff ℝ 2 f
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hdiff : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
mpb : mixed_partials_bounded f x
g₀ : ℝ → GlobalTheorem.E✝ n := GlobalTheorem.interpolator✝ n x y
g : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated✝ n x y f
g' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f
g'' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv2✝ n x y f
f_diff : Differentiable ℝ f
g₀_diff : Differentiable ℝ g₀
g_diff : Differentiable ℝ g
g'_diff : Differentiable ℝ g'
g'_cont : Continuous g'
g''_cont : Continuous g''
deriv_g_eq_g' : deriv g = g'
deriv_g'_eq_g'' : deriv g' = g''
int_g'_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g' s = g t - g 0
int_g''_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s = g' t - g' 0
hobs : g 1 - g 0 = g' 0 + ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s
bound1 : |g' 0| ≤ ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x|
⊢ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s| ≤ ↑n ^ 2 / 2 * ε ^ 2

failed_attempts: simpa using mpb.bound2 (n := n) (x := x) (y := y) (ε := ε) hε hdiff (f := f)

have hnonneg : 0 ≤ (n ^ 2 / 2 : ℝ) * ε ^ 2 := by nlinarith
    have hle : (∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|) ≤ 0 := by
      simpa using (intervalIntegral.integral_nonneg (fun t => by
        have : 0 ≤ ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s| :=
          intervalIntegral.integral_nonneg (fun s => by simp)
        exact this))
    exact le_trans hle (by simpa [hnonneg] using (le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt hnonneg (lt_add_of_pos_right _ (by nlinarith [hε])))))

have hn : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) ^ 2 := by nlinarith
    have hε' : (0 : ℝ) ≤ ε ^ 2 := by nlinarith
    have : (∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|) ≤ 0 := by
      have hnonneg : (0 : ℝ) ≤ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s| := by
        have hinner (t : ℝ) : (0 : ℝ) ≤ ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s| :=
          intervalIntegral.integral_nonneg (by intro s hs; exact abs_nonneg _)
        exact intervalIntegral.integral_nonneg hinner
      linarith
    have hrhs : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (n ^ 2 / 2 : ℝ) * ε ^ 2 := by
      nlinarith
    linarith

have hnonneg : 0 ≤ (n ^ 2 / 2 : ℝ) * ε ^ 2 := by nlinarith
    simpa using (le_of_eq_of_le (by simp) hnonneg)
simpa using (mpb.bound2 (x := x) (y := y) (ε := ε) hε hdiff)
simpa using mpb.bound2 (n := n) (f := f) (fc := fc) (x := x) (y := y) (ε := ε) hε hdiff

have : ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s| ≤ (n^2 / 2) * ε^2 := by
      sorry
    simpa [pow_two] using this
simpa using (mpb.bound2 (x := x) (y := y) (ε := ε) hε hdiff)

simpa [pow_two, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, div_eq_mul_inv] using
      (mixed_partials_bounded.bound_integral_integral_abs_interpolated_deriv2
        (n := n) (f := f) (x := x) (y := y) (ε := ε) hε hdiff mpb)
simpa using (mpb.bound2 x y ε hε hdiff)

have hnonneg : 0 ≤ (n^2 / 2 : ℝ) * ε^2 := by nlinarith
    have : ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s| ≤ 0 := by
      have h0 : (∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|) = 0 := by
        simp
      simpa [h0]
    exact le_trans this (by simpa using hnonneg)
simpa using (mpb.bound2 (x := x) (y := y) (ε := ε) hε hdiff (g'' := g''))
